data.title: Scaffold skill eval config for design-wireframe
data.description:
## Description

Generate the skill eval scaffold for the design-wireframe skill, which currently has no eval configuration. Run:

```bash
.claude/scripts/dso generate-skill-eval.sh design-wireframe
```

This creates `plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml` with the base eval structure.

### Files to modify
- Create: `plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml`

## TDD Requirement

After scaffolding, verify the generated YAML is valid and contains required structure (no TODO markers, at least one test case). Test approach: run the scaffold command, then validate YAML structure.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml` exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] YAML is valid
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml'))"
